attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT TMP.HOLD_SOURCE_ID, TMP.HOLD_ID, TMP.ATTRIBUTE1, TMP.ATTRIBUTE10, TMP.ATTRIBUTE11, TMP.ATTRIBUTE12, TMP.ATTRIBUTE13, TMP.ATTRIBUTE14, TMP.ATTRIBUTE15, TMP.ATTRIBUTE2, TMP.ATTRIBUTE3, TMP.ATTRIBUTE4, TMP.ATTRIBUTE5, TMP.ATTRIBUTE6, TMP.ATTRIBUTE7, TMP.ATTRIBUTE8, TMP.ATTRIBUTE9, TMP.CONTEXT, TMP.CREATED_BY, TMP.CREATION_DATE, TMP.HOLD_COMMENT, TMP.HOLD_ENTITY_CODE, TMP.HOLD_ENTITY_CODE2, TMP.HOLD_ENTITY_ID, TMP.HOLD_ENTITY_ID2, TMP.HOLD_RELEASE_ID, TMP.HOLD_UNTIL_DATE, TMP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TMP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TMP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, TMP.ORG_ID, TMP.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, TMP.PROGRAM_ID, TMP.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, TMP.RELEASED_FLAG, TMP.REQUEST_ID, 
TMP. CREATE_DATETIME,'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME,TMP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, TMP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
(
SELECT HOLD_SOURCE_ID, HOLD_ID, ATTRIBUTE1, ATTRIBUTE10, ATTRIBUTE11, ATTRIBUTE12, ATTRIBUTE13, ATTRIBUTE14, ATTRIBUTE15, ATTRIBUTE2, ATTRIBUTE3, ATTRIBUTE4, ATTRIBUTE5, ATTRIBUTE6, ATTRIBUTE7, ATTRIBUTE8, ATTRIBUTE9, CONTEXT, CREATED_BY, CREATION_DATE, HOLD_COMMENT, HOLD_ENTITY_CODE, HOLD_ENTITY_CODE2, HOLD_ENTITY_ID, HOLD_ENTITY_ID2, HOLD_RELEASE_ID, HOLD_UNTIL_DATE, LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, ORG_ID, PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, PROGRAM_ID, PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, RELEASED_FLAG, REQUEST_ID, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,SOURCE_DML_TYPE, SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_OE_HOLD_SOURCES_ALL COHSCA,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
WHERE
COHSCA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND
NCOU.MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG  = 'Y'     
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <=  '$$EndLastExtractDate'
AND SOURCE_DML_TYPE <>'DELETE'
) TMP
QUALIFY RANK () OVER (PARTITION BY TMP.HOLD_SOURCE_ID ORDER BY TMP.HOLD_SOURCE_ID, TMP.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
